name: Path Equivalence: 'filename.' (Trailing Dot)
description: The product does not properly handle filenames with trailing dots, which on some operating systems (Windows) are silently stripped, allowing attackers to bypass access controls by appending a dot to restricted filenames.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a filename with trailing dot that bypasses a CONTROL[path_check] because the check matches against the dotted form while the OS resolves to the canonical form without the dot, granting access to STORAGE[file_access] that should be restricted
